name: youtube-watched-marker
description: Firefox-first WebExtension for queueing YouTube™ videos and simulating watched playback.

scripts.check: node --check src/utils/extension.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/player-worker.js && node --check src/youtube-seed.js && node --check src/youtube-content.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check test/youtube.test.js
scripts.lint: web-ext lint --source-dir . --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json node_modules web-ext-artifacts test
scripts.build: web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --ignore-files package.json package-lock.json node_modules web-ext-artifacts README.md test
